violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. PIC has application. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026

Bagged lunches were observed held in delivery coolers at 43-46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Lunches were moved to refrigeration. Lunches that did not fit in refrigeration were packed with extra ice packs to maintain temperature control. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The door to the outside, located near the trash receptacles, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The area around the dumpsters was observed with an accumulation of trash debris and syringes. Staff reported they clean the area, but people return to the area and leave this debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The door to the outside, located near the dumpster area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Main kitchen was informed; test strips to be delivered with lunch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Staff cleaned gaskets during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The floors in the storage/office area have an accumulation of dust and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

Sink and surface solution was in excess of 1130 parts per million (ppm). A sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Adjusted during time of inspection 272 ppm DDBSA. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
